title: Add export option to include past N days on Android and iOS
description:
Add a user setting (Android and iOS) to export the past N days of data automatically so users don't have to adjust the calendar before each export.

> Would you also be able to add a specific setting (on both android and iphone version) for exporting the past N days worth of data, so I dont have to keep checking or updating the calendar date before export. I almost always export the data for 'today' and 'yesterday' - on a daily basis (in update mode) on both devices. if i need to continue doing this manually, the N days update would be really helpful

Source: https://discord.com/channels/1443424100759634003/1498086744443326581/1502295039815188743
